_meta.description: Compact D2 1.13c reference rules distilled from affixcalc.html. Bound by tests in tests/D2Companion.Tests/ReferenceConsistencyTests.cs. Do not edit without updating the test expectations.

parseTable.rule: Skip the literal 'Expansion' row when iterating; mark every subsequent row as expansion=1. Other label rows ('Armor', 'Rings', 'Elite Uniques', ...) are kept.

crafted.rule: Crafted items must NOT pick up a transformcolor from prefix/suffix/automagic. getItemColor short-circuits with quality===8.

perLevelStats.rule: Per-level stats are never hidden purely on the basis of missing CharacterLevel or a fallback-zero result. The visible 0 signals data freshness rather than hiding it.

ethereal.rule: Styx pre-scales Defense/Damage on the wire, so the C# renderer does not need to apply 1.5x again.

skillBonus.rule: item_singleskill is a native class skill bonus on a class-restricted base — append the owning class. item_nonclassskill is an oskill (e.g. CtA Battle Orders, Enigma Teleport) and never gets the class suffix.
